nasb.text: But when the apostles Barnabas and Paul heard of it, they tore their robes and rushed out into the crowd, crying out

esv.text: But when the apostles Barnabas and Paul heard of it, they tore their garments and rushed out into the crowd, crying out,

cnv.text: 巴拿巴和保羅兩個使徒聽見了，就撕裂衣服，跳進群眾中間，喊著說：

ccb.text: 巴拿巴和保罗见此情形，就撕裂衣服，冲进人群中，大声喊着说：

csbs.text: 巴拿巴和保罗两位使徒听见这事，就撕裂自己的衣服，冲进人群里面，
